title: Dua and Amaal for 3rd of the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Salaat / Namaaz for 3rd eve
duas.description:
Amaal for night preceding 3rd of Ramadan
Ten Rakaat: In every rakaat Surah al-Fatihah once and Surah al-Tawhid fifty times.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ ارْزُقْنِي فِيهِ الذّهْنَ وَالتّنْبِيهَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma arzuqny fihi aldhdhhna wal-ttnbiha
segments.translation: O Allah: on this day, (please) confer upon me with sound mentality and acumen,

segments.arabic: وَبَاعِدْنِي فِيهِ مِنَ السّفَاهَةِ وَالتّمْوِيهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ba`idny fihi mina alssfahati wal-ttmuihi
segments.translation: And take me away from foolishness and deception,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لِي نَصِيباً مِنْ كُلّ خَيْرٍ تُنْزِلُ فِيهِ،
segments.transliteration: waj`al li nasiban min kulli khayrin tunzilu fihi
segments.translation: And decide for me a share from each goodness that You descend on this day,

segments.arabic: بِجُودِكَ يَا أَجْوَدَ الأَجْوَدِينَ.
segments.transliteration: bijudika ya ajwada alajwadina
segments.translation: By Your magnanimity; O the most Magnanimous of all those who are magnanimous.

duas.title: Holy Prophet's (sawa) Dua
duas.description: 1.On the authority of the Prophet(peace and blessings be upon him and his family)-Iqbal Aamal- 3rd

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ إِلَهَ إِسْحَاقَ وَ إِلَهَ يَعْقُوبَ وَ الْأَسْبَاطِ
segments.translation: O God of Abraham, Issac, Jacob and the Tribes!

segments.arabic: رَبَّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ السَّمِيعَ الْعَلِيمَ الْحَلِيمَ الْكَرِيمَ الْعَلِيَّ الْعَظِيمَ
segments.translation: O Lord of the Angels and Spirt! The All-Hearing! The All-Knowing! The Forebearing, the Generous! The Sublime, the Supreme!

segments.arabic: لَكَ صُمْتُ وَ عَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ
segments.translation: O my God! I fasted for You and I break my fast with Your Sustenance.

segments.arabic: وَ إِلَى كَنَفِكَ آوَيْتُ وَ إِلَيْكَ أَنَبْتُ وَ إِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
segments.translation: And I rely upon You and to You do I turn in repentance as indeed to You is our Final Goal

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ الرَّءُوفُ الرَّحِيمُ
segments.translation: And You are the Compassionate, the Merciful!

segments.arabic: قَوِّنِي عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ وَ الصِّيَامِ
segments.translation: Please give me strength to pray and fast

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُخْزِنِي‌ يَوْمَ الْقِيامَةِ إِنَّكَ لا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعادَ
segments.translation: and save us from shame on the Day of Judgment: For You never breakest Your promise

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُحَلُّ بِهِ عُقَدُ الْمَكَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: Yā man tuḥallu bihi ʿuqud al-makārih
segments.translation: O You by whom the knots of hardships are untied

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ يُفْثَأُ بِهِ حَدُّ الشَّدَائِدِ
segments.transliteration: Wa yā man yuftha’u bihi ḥaddu al-shadā’id
segments.translation: O You by whom the severity of difficulties is softened

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ يُلْتَمَسُ مِنْهُ الْمَخْرَجُ
segments.transliteration: Wa yā man yultamisu minhu al-makhraj
segments.translation: O You from whom an escape is sought

segments.arabic: إِلَى رَوْحِ الْفَرَجِ
segments.transliteration: Ilā rawḥi al-faraj
segments.translation: Towards relief and ease

segments.arabic: ذَلَّتْ لِقُدْرَتِكَ الصِّعَابُ
segments.transliteration: Dhallat liqudratika al-ṣiʿāb
segments.translation: Difficulties submit to Your power

segments.arabic: وَ تَسَبَّبَتْ بِلُطْفِكَ الْأَسْبَابُ
segments.transliteration: Wa tasabbabat biluṭfika al-asbāb
segments.translation: And means are made possible by Your kindness

segments.arabic: وَ جَرَى بِطَاعَتِكَ الْقَضَاءُ
segments.transliteration: Wa jarā biṭāʿatika al-qaḍā’
segments.translation: Destiny flows according to Your obedience

segments.arabic: وَ مَضَتْ عَلَى إِرَادَتِكَ الْأَشْيَاءُ
segments.transliteration: Wa maḍat ʿalā irādatika al-ashyā’
segments.translation: And all things proceed according to Your will

segments.arabic: فَهِيَ بِمَشِيَّتِكَ مُؤْتَمِرَةٌ
segments.transliteration: Fahiya bimashiyyatika mu’tamirah
segments.translation: Thus, they obey Your command by Your will

segments.arabic: وَبِإِرَادَتِكَ مُنْزَجِرَةٌ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi’irādatika munzajirah
segments.translation: And they refrain by Your decree

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ الْمَدْعُوُّ لِلْمُهِمَّاتِ
segments.transliteration: Anta al-madʿū lil-muhimmāt
segments.translation: You are the One called upon for critical matters

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ الْمَفْزَعُ فِي الْمُلِمَّاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa anta al-mafzaʿu fī al-mulimāt
segments.translation: And You are the refuge in times of distress

segments.arabic: لَا يَنْدَفِعُ مِنْهَا إِلَّا مَا دَفَعْتَ
segments.transliteration: Lā yandafiʿu minhā illā mā dafaʿta
segments.translation: None of it is repelled except by what You repel

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَنْكَشِفُ إِلَّا مَا كَشَفْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā yankashifu illā mā kashafta
segments.translation: And none of it is uncovered except by what You uncover

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ مَا قَدْ تَكَأَّدَنِي ثِقْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabbī mā qad taka’adanī thiqluhu
segments.translation: O Lord, what has burdened me with its weight

segments.arabic: وَ أَلَمَّ بِي مَا قَدْ بَهَظَنِي حَمْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa alamma bī mā qad bahaẓanī ḥamluhu
segments.translation: And what has overwhelmed me with its load

segments.arabic: وَبِقُدْرَتِكَ أَوْرَدْتَهُ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: Wa biqudratika awradtahu ʿalayya
segments.translation: By Your power, You have brought it upon me

segments.arabic: وَبِسُلْطَانِكَ وَجَّهْتَهُ إِلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: Wa bisulṭānika wajjahtahu ilayya
segments.translation: And by Your authority, You have directed it to me

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُصْدِرَ لِمَا أَوْرَدْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā muṣdira limā awradt
segments.translation: There is no way to release what You have sent

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُورِدَ لِمَا أَصْدَرْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā mūrida limā aṣdart
segments.translation: Nor is there an approach to what You have withdrawn

segments.arabic: وَ لَا صَارِفَ لِمَا وَجَّهْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā ṣārifa limā wajjaht
segments.translation: There is none who can turn away what You have directed

segments.arabic: وَ لَا فَاتِحَ لِمَا أَغْلَقْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā fātiḥa limā aghlaqta
segments.translation: And no opener for what You have closed

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُغْلِقَ لِمَا فَتَحْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā mughliqa limā fataḥta
segments.translation: And no closer for what You have opened

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُيَسِّرَ لِمَا عَسَّرْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā muyassira limā ʿassarta
segments.translation: And no one can ease what You have made difficult

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُعَسِّرَ لِمَا يَسَّرْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā muʿassira limā yassarta
segments.translation: And no one can make difficult what You have made easy

segments.arabic: وَ لَا نَاصِرَ لِمَنْ خَذَلْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā nāṣira liman khadhalta
segments.translation: And there is no helper for the one You forsake

segments.arabic: وَ لَا خَاذِلَ لِمَنْ نَصَرْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā khādila liman naṣarta
segments.translation: And no one can forsake whom You have supported

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Faṣalli ʿalā Muḥammadin wa Āli Muḥammad
segments.translation: So send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ افْتَحْ لِي يَارَبِّ بَابَ الْفَرَجِ بِطَوْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa iftaḥ lī yā Rabb bāba alfaraji biṭawlik
segments.translation: And open for me, O Lord, the door of relief by Your bounty

segments.arabic: وَ اكْسِرْ عَنِّي سُلْطَانَ الْهَمِّ بِحَوْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ksir ʿannī sulṭāna alhammi biḥawlik
segments.translation: And break the power of sorrow over me by Your might

segments.arabic: وَ أَنِلْنِي حُسْنَ النَّظَرِ فِيمَا شَكَوْتُ
segments.transliteration: Wa anilnī ḥusna alnaẓari fīmā shakawt
segments.translation: And grant me good perception regarding what I have complained of

segments.arabic: وَ أَذِقْنِي حَلَاوَةَ الصُّنْعِ فِيمَا سَأَلْتُ
segments.transliteration: Wa adhiqnī ḥalāwata alṣunʿi fīmā sa’alt
segments.translation: And let me taste the sweetness of Your action in what I asked

segments.arabic: وَ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فَرَجاً هَنِيئاً
segments.transliteration: Wa hab lī min ladunka farajan hanīʾan
segments.translation: And grant me from Yourself a relief that is pleasant

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ عِنْدِكَ مَخْرَجاً وَحِيّاً
segments.transliteration: Wa ajʿal lī min ʿindika makhrajān waḥiyyā
segments.translation: And provide for me from You an immediate escape

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَشْغَلْنِي بِالاهْتِمَامِ عَنْ تَعَاهُدِ فُرُوضِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā tashghalnī bilihtimāmi ʿan taʿāhudi furūḍik
segments.translation: And do not let my concerns distract me from fulfilling Your obligations

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتِعْمَالِ سُنَّتِكَ فَقَدْ ضِقْتُ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: Wa istiʿmāli sunnatik faqad ḍiqtu yā Rabb
segments.translation: And from following Your way, for I have become weary, O Lord

segments.arabic:  لِمَا نَزَلَ بِي ذَرْعاً
segments.transliteration: Limā nazala bī dharʿan
segments.translation: Because of what has befallen me, I have become weak

segments.arabic: وَ امْتَلَأْتُ بِحَمْلِ مَا حَدَثَ عَلَيَّ هَمّاً
segments.transliteration: Wa imtala’tu biḥamli mā ḥadatha ʿalayya hamman
segments.translation: And I have been filled with worry due to what has occurred to me

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كَشْفِ مَا مُنِيتُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa anta alqādiru ʿalā kashfi mā munītu bihi
segments.translation: And You are capable of removing what I have been afflicted with

segments.arabic: وَ دَفْعِ مَا وَقَعْتُ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa dafʿi mā waqaʿtu fīhi
segments.translation: And repelling what I have fallen into

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Faṣalli ʿalā Muḥammadin wa Āli Muḥammad
segments.translation: So send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ افْعَلْ بِي ذَلِكَ وَ إِنْ لَمْ أَسْتَوْجِبْهُ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ifʿal bī dhālika wa in lam astawjibhu minka
segments.translation: And do this for me, even if I do not deserve it from You

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا ذَا الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabbī yā dhā alʿarshi alkarīm
segments.translation: O Lord, O Possessor of the noble Throne

segments.arabic: وَ السُّلْطَانِ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: Wa alsulṭāni alʿaẓīm
segments.translation: And the great authority

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ خَلَوْنَا بِهِ وَحْدَنَا
segments.transliteration: Yā khayra man khalawnā bihi waḥdanā
segments.translation: O best One whom we confide in when alone

segments.arabic: وَ يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ أَشَرْنَا إِلَيْهِ بِكَفِّنَا
segments.transliteration: Wa yā khayra man ashernā ilayhi bikaffinā
segments.translation: And O best One to whom we gesture with our hands

segments.arabic: نَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَنْ تُلْهِمَنَا الْخَيْرَ وَ تُعْطِيَنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: Nas’aluka Allāhumma an tulhimanā alkhayra wa tuʿṭīnāhu
segments.translation: We ask You, O Allah, to inspire us with goodness and grant it to us

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَصْرِفَ عَنَّا الشَّرَّ وَ تَكْفِيَنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa an taṣrifa ʿannā alsharra wa takfiyanāhu
segments.translation: And to turn away evil from us and suffice us from it

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَدْحَرَ عَنَّا الشَّيْطَانَ وَ تُبَعِّدَنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa an tadhara ʿannā alshayṭāna wa tubaʿidanāhu
segments.translation: And to drive away Satan from us and keep him distant

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَرْزُقَنَا الْفِرْدَوْسَ وَ تُحِلَّنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa an tarzuqanā alfirdawsa wa tuḥillanāhu
segments.translation: And to grant us Paradise and make us dwell therein

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَسْقِيَنَا مِنْ حَوْضِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa an tasqiyanā min ḥawḍi Muḥammadin wa Āli Muḥammad
segments.translation: And to give us drink from the basin of Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: وَ تُوْرِدَنَاهُ وَ نَدْعُوكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa tuwridanāhu wa nadʿūka
segments.translation: And to bring us to it, and we call upon You

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّنَا تَضَرُّعاً وَ خِيفَةً وَ رَغْبَةً وَ رَهْبَةً
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabbanā taḍarruʿan wa khīfatan wa raghbatan wa rahbatan
segments.translation: O our Lord, in humility, fear, hope, and awe

segments.arabic: وَ خَوْفاً وَ طَمَعاً إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
segments.transliteration: Wa khawfan wa ṭamaʿan innaka samīʿu alduʿā’
segments.translation: And in fear and longing, truly You are the Hearer of supplications

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣallā Allāhu ʿalā Muḥammadin wa ālihi
segments.translation: And may Allah send blessings upon Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحُرْمَةِ مَنْ عَاذَ بِكَ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as’aluka biḥurmati man ʿādha bika minka
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You by the sanctity of the one who seeks refuge in You from You

segments.arabic: وَ لَجَأَ إِلَى عِزِّكَ وَ اسْتَظَلَّ بِفَيْئِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa laja’a ilā ʿizzika wa istaẓalla bifi’ika
segments.translation: And who has taken shelter in Your might and sought shade in Your mercy

segments.arabic: وَ اعْتَصَمَ بِحَبْلِكَ وَ لَمْ يَثِقْ إِلَّا بِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa iʿtaṣama biḥablika wa lam yathiq illā bika
segments.translation: And has held firmly to Your rope, trusting none but You

segments.arabic: يَا جَزِيلَ الْعَطَايَا وَ يَا فَكَّاكَ الْأُسَارَى
segments.transliteration: Yā jazīla alʿaṭāyā wa yā fakkāka alusārā
segments.translation: O Generous in giving, O Liberator of the captives

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ الْمَفْزَعُ فِي الْمُلِمَّاتِ وَ أَنْتَ الْمَدْعُوُّ لِلْمُهِمَّاتِ
segments.transliteration: Anta almafzaʿu fī almulimāt wa anta almadʿū lilmuhimmāt
segments.translation: You are the refuge in hardships, and You are the One called upon for urgent matters

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Ṣalli ʿalā Muḥammadin wa Āli Muḥammad
segments.translation: Send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لِي فَرَجاً وَ مَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: Wa ajʿal lī farajan wa makhrajā
segments.translation: And grant me relief and a way out

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنِي رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً بِمَا شِئْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa arzuqnī rizqan wāsiʿan bimā shi’ta
segments.translation: And provide me with abundant sustenance as You will

segments.arabic: إِذَا شِئْتَ وَ كَيْفَ شِئْتَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: Idhā shi’ta wa kayfa shi’ta yā arḥama alrāḥimīn
segments.translation: Whenever You will and however You will, O Most Merciful of the merciful

duas.title: Night - Muhammad ibn Abi Qarrih
duas.description: 3rd Night Dua- Muhammad ibn Abi Qarrih book Amal-i-Shahr-i-Ramadan

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.translation: O my God! Please bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny

segments.arabic: وَ افْتَحْ قَلْبِي لِذِكْرِكَ وَ اجْعَلْنِي أَتَّبِعُ كِتَابَكَ وَ أُومِنُ بِرَسُولِكَ
segments.translation: Please open my heart to Your Remembrance, make me follow Your Book, believe in Your Prophet

segments.arabic: وَ أُوفِي بِعَهْدِكَ وَ أَلْبِسْنِي رَحْمَتَكَ وَ تَقَبَّلْ صَوْمِي
segments.translation: loyal to Your Covenant. Please bless me with Your Mercy and accept my fast

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هَذَا الشَّهْرِ الشَّرِيفِ الْعَظِيمِ بِجُودِكَ وَ كَرَمِكَ
segments.translation: O my God! I seek nearness to You in this grand honorable month by Your Generosity and Benevolence

segments.arabic: وَ أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِمَلَائِكَتِكَ وَ أَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ رُسُلِكَ
segments.translation: I seek nearness to You by Your Angels, Prophets, and Messengers

segments.arabic: وَ أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِالْمُسْتَحْفِظِينَ أَوَّلِهِمْ وَ آخِرِهِمْ
segments.translation: I seek nearness to You by the guards – the very first one and the last

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.translation: I ask You to bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny

segments.arabic: وَ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذُنُوبِي [الذُّنُوبَ‌] جَمِيعاً السَّاعَةَ السَّاعَةَ اللَّيْلَةَ اللَّيْلَةَ
segments.translation: and forgive all my sins in this very hour and this very day
Then raise your hands and try to shed tears

duas.title: Syed Ibn Baqi Dua
duas.description: 6.Syed Ibn Baqi Dua- Iqbal Aamal - 3rd Ramadan

segments.arabic: ‌ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا مُيَسِّرَ كُلِّ عَسِيرٍ
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You, O Facilitator of every difficulty,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ هُوَ حَسَنُ التَّدْبِيرِ
segments.translation: and O He who is excellent in arrangement,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ لَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى تَفْسِيرٍ
segments.translation: and O He who does not need explanation,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ كُلِّ كَبِيرٍ
segments.translation: and O He who is greater than every great,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ لَا وَزِيرَ
segments.translation: and O He who has no partner nor minister,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا صَاحِبَةَ لَهُ وَ لَا ضِدَّ وَ لَا نِدَّ وَ لَا مُعِينَ وَ لَا ظَهِيرَ
segments.translation: O He who has no companion, nor opponent, nor equal, nor helper, nor supporter,

segments.arabic: يَا جَابِرَ الْعَظْمِ الْكَسِيرِ يَا مُعِينَ الْبَائِسِ الْفَقِيرِ
segments.translation: O Repairer of the broken bone, O Helper of the desperate poor,

segments.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ الشَّمْسِ وَ الْقَمَرِ الْمُنِيرِ
segments.translation: O Creator of the sun and the illuminating moon,

segments.arabic: يَا سَالِكَ الْفَلَكِ الْمُدِيرِ يَا رَازِقَ الطِّفْلِ الصَّغِيرِ
segments.translation: O Mover of the orbiting celestial sphere, O Provider for the small child,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَفْتَحَ مَسَامِعَ قَلْبِي لِذِكْرِكَ وَ اتِّبَاعِ كُتُبِكَ
segments.translation: I ask You to open the ears of my heart to Your remembrance, and following Your books,

segments.arabic: وَ التَّصْدِيقِ بِأَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ الْوَفَاءِ بِعَهْدِكَ
segments.translation: and believing in Your prophets, and fulfilling Your covenant,

segments.arabic: وَ الْإِيمَانِ بِوَعْدِكَ فَإِنِّي
segments.translation: and believing in Your promise, for indeed,

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهِي بِنُورِكَ اهْتَدَيْتُ وَ بِفَضْلِكَ اسْتَغْنَيْتُ
segments.translation: O my God, by Your light I have been guided, and by Your grace I have been sufficed,

segments.arabic: وَ بِكَ أَصْبَحْتُ وَ أَمْسَيْتُ
segments.translation: and by You I have become in the morning and the evening.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي ذُنُوبِي بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْهَا وَ أَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.translation: My God, my sins are before You, I ask for Your forgiveness for them and I repent to You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تُؤَخِّرْنِي فِي الْأَشْرَارِ وَ لَا تُكْثِرْ بِي أَهْلَ النَّارِ
segments.translation: O Allah, do not delay me among the wicked, nor increase the people of the fire with me,

segments.arabic: أَحْيِنِي حَيَاةً طَيِّبَةً وَ تَوَفَّنِي وَفَاةً طَيِّبَةً كَرِيمَةً
segments.translation: grant me a good life and cause me to die a noble death,

segments.arabic: وَ أَلْحِقْنِي بِالْأَبْرَارِ
segments.translation: and join me with the righteous.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ‌إِنِّي أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِذُنُوبِي وَ أَعْرِضُ عَلَيْكَ حَوَائِجِي
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask for Your forgiveness for my sins and present to You my needs.

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ فَوْقَ رَغْبَتِي وَ أَرْغَبُ إِلَى كَرَمِكَ فِي التَّجَاوُزِ عَنْ ظُلْمِي لِنَفْسِي
segments.translation: I ask You beyond my desire and aspire to Your generosity in overlooking the injustice I have done to myself,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ غِنَايَ وَ هُدَايَ فِي نَفْسِي
segments.translation: and that You make my wealth and guidance within myself,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَتَقَبَّلَهُ مِنِّي وَ تُبْلِغَنِي تَمَامَهُ
segments.translation: and that You accept it from me, and complete it for me,

segments.arabic: وَ تُسَلِّمَهُ لِي وَ تَسْلَمَنِي مِنَ الْإِثْمِ فِيهِ بِعِزِّكَ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.translation: and deliver it to me, and save me from sin in it by Your great honor,

segments.arabic: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.translation: by Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ.
segments.translation: And may Allah send blessings upon Muhammad and his pure family.

_index_meta.title: Dua and Amaal for 3rd of the month of Ramadan
